imageAlt: SC: Suggest files in bank transactions roadmap item preview image
title: SC: Suggest files in bank transactions
summaryBody: Make it easier for customers to select a captured file to attach to a bank transaction, by adding additional fields to the ‘Choose a saved file’ modal and  offering suggestions where a partial match is found.
detailBody: Make it easier for customers to select a captured file to attach to a bank transaction, by adding additional fields to the ‘Choose a saved file’ modal and  offering suggestions where a partial match is found.
